name: Scampi Style Skillet Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the chicken into 1 1/2-inch cubes.
2. Season lightly with salt and pepper.
3. Spray a large non-stick skillet with cooking spray.
4. Arrange the chicken cubes in a single layer.
5. Brown over medium heat (3-4 minutes per side).
6. Transfer to a heated platter.
7. Add the remaining ingredients to the skillet.
8. Cook, stirring until the butter melts and the mixture combines.
9. Spoon over the chicken cubes.
10. Serve.
